action.reasoning:

1. Syntax error in model.py at line 40 where the docstring and code are incorrectly formatted
2. Network error when trying to download the ResNet50 model (network is disabled)

Analysis: The model.py file has a syntax error in the sample method of the DecoderRNN class. Also, since the network is disabled, I need to modify the model to use a pre-downloaded version of ResNet50 rather than downloading it during initialization.

Decision: Fix the syntax error in model.py and update the EncoderCNN to use a pre-trained ResNet50 without downloading. Since ResNet-50 (25M, ImageNet) is mentioned as pre-downloaded, I should be able to load it differently.
